title: From Transcription to Live Music: Gemini's Audio Stack — Thor Schaeff, Google DeepMind
summary: Gemini 3 Flash Preview provides audio understanding including speaker identification, timestamps, emotion detection, language detection with translation, and summarization in a single API call. Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is a real-time multimodal sound-to-sound model with integrated reasoning capabilities for interactive audio and speech applications.
writeup: This talk from Google DeepMind's Thor Schaeff walks through Gemini's audio stack across two models. Gemini 3 Flash Preview handles audio understanding in a single API call: speaker identification, timestamps, emotion detection, language detection with translation, and summarization. Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is a real-time, sound-to-sound multimodal model with integrated reasoning aimed at interactive audio and speech applications. The session matters because it consolidates transcription, diarization, and live conversational audio into one model family rather than separate components.
